## Documentation Improvement

**What documentation aspect would you like to improve?**

**What type of documentation improvement?**
- [ ] README updates
- [ ] Code comments
- [ ] API documentation
- [ ] Setup instructions
- [ ] Troubleshooting guide
- [ ] Contributing guidelines
- [ ] Code examples
- [ ] Architecture diagrams
- [ ] User guides
- [ ] Developer guides
- [ ] Other (please specify)

**Where is this documentation located?**
- [ ] README.md
- [ ] CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md
- [ ] SUPPORT.md
- [ ] Code files
- [ ] Wiki pages
- [ ] External docs
- [ ] API docs
- [ ] Other (please specify)

**Current documentation**
Describe what's currently documented.

**Proposed improvement**
Describe what improvement you'd like to see.

**Target audience**
Who is this documentation improvement for?
- [ ] New contributors
- [ ] Users
- [ ] Developers
- [ ] Maintainers
- [ ] End users
- [ ] System administrators
- [ ] Other (please specify)

**Specific areas**
What specific sections or topics need improvement?

**Documentation format**
- [ ] Text
- [ ] Code examples
- [ ] Screenshots
- [ ] Videos
- [ ] Diagrams
- [ ] Interactive examples
- [ ] Other (please specify)

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the documentation improvement here.

**Priority level**
- [ ] Critical (missing essential info)
- [ ] High (significant gaps)
- [ ] Medium (moderate improvement)
- [ ] Low (minor enhancement)

**Note**: Better documentation helps everyone use and contribute to the project!

**Note**: Good documentation is an investment that pays off in the long run!

**Note**: Clear documentation reduces support requests and onboarding time!

**Note**: Documentation should be living and updated regularly!
